extraction.one_line_summary: GAVIRIA Fernando won Stage 4 sprint with RICHEZE Maximiliano's left-side slingshot leadout, holding off SAGAN Peter and GREIPEL André after RICHEZE exploited right-crosswind positioning advantage.
tactical_patterns: RICHEZE Maximiliano's left-side leadout with right-crosswind gave Quick-Step 2-3kmh slingshot advantage over right-positioned trains, decisive positioning tactic.
Dimension Data burned team catching breakaway but couldn't deliver CAVENDISH Mark, revealing critical error: don't sacrifice leadout train for chase duty.
GAVIRIA's second acceleration capability after initial kick differentiates him from single-surge sprinters, averaged 58kmh final 500m uphill into headwind.
EF's immediate bike swap via MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe saved URÁN Rigoberto's GC after sub-5km crash, demonstrating time-cut rule exploitation teamwork.

rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: positive: Two-kick sprint capacity allows him to counter premature surges, different tactical weapon than SAGAN's sustained power
rider_signals.RICHEZE Maximiliano: positive: Executed high-risk no-brakes left-side leadout exploiting crosswind draft, elite tactical awareness under pressure
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: Perfectly positioned by RENSHAW Mark but lacked finishing power, suggests declining sprint speed not positioning issues
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: neutral: Nearly won despite suboptimal positioning, green jersey battle will force defensive mountain breakaway tactics unprecedented in recent Tours
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: positive: Physical contact aggression final 75m showed desperation tactics work, nearly stole third from poor position
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: neutral: Team's bike-swap scramble worked but reliance on sub-5km rule protection reveals GC contenders' crash vulnerability in sprint stages
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: negative: Lost one minute same crash that URÁN survived, poor team support compared to EF's immediate response
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Referenced earlier time loss from poor decision-making under pressure, mental weakness when crashes occur
